name: Grilled Vegetable Soup (Emeril)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound zucchini, sliced into 1/2-inch lengthwise slices
1/4 pound yellow squash, sliced into 1/2-inch lengthwise slices
1 small red onion, sliced into 1/2-inch pieces
1/4 pound red pepper, quartered and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Toss all the vegetables in the olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Carefully grill all the vegetables, ensuring you get grill marks (where the flavor is concentrated).
4. Set aside to cool once grilled.
5. When cool enough, dice all the vegetables into uniform small pieces.
6. Add the diced vegetables to the soup base and adjust the seasonings as needed.
